whats_trending_now.cluster: Aftermarket Royal Pop wrist conversion race
whats_trending_now.why: Competitors are rushing to market with wrist adapters, validating demand for Pop Wrist Studio's premium, engineered solution. Addresses FOMO and fear of cheap alternatives.
Audiences are hyper-focused on 40.35mm fit requirements. Technical hooks (e.g., 0.7mm retaining lip) will resonate with watch enthusiasts and collectors.
May 16, 2026 launch is driving pre-launch buzz. Independent accessory brands can capture attention by aligning with this momentum without claiming affiliation.

final_brief.why_these_will_work: The trends validate Pop Wrist Studio's positioning: premium engineering (40.35mm spec), scarcity (competitor FOMO), and design-led appeal (Royal Pop hype). No creative work needed for this probe, but these clusters should inform future briefs.
final_brief.do_this_first: Review the full trend report at outputs\trend_report_2026-05-18.json for competitor analysis and platform-specific opportunities.
